name: spike-investigation
description: Bounded technical spikes and feasibility investigation for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run bounded feasibility spikes before committing to an implementation path
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for bounded technical spikes. It helps explore uncertain approaches through small throwaway experiments, compare findings, and turn the result into a grounded recommendation before planning full implementation.
defaultPrompt: Run a bounded spike before we commit to this architecture
Test a few implementation approaches and summarize the findings
Use a spike to reduce uncertainty before planning
